name: fengshui-master-intake-contracts
purpose: Machine-readable domain intake contracts for deciding what to ask, what can be assumed, when to proceed with caveats, and when a FengShui Master answer must stay at checklist level.

domains.summary: Homes, offices, shops, rooms, sites, entrances, beds, desks, kitchens, floor plans, and form-school layout review.
optional_inputs: door, bed, desk, stove, and water positions
assumption_allowed_inputs: a rough compass direction for a non-precise form reading
budget when recommendations can be low-cost
red_lines: do not claim guaranteed wealth health or relationship outcomes
do not make precise compass claims from vague directions

domains.summary: Investing, portfolio, cash flow, market timing, budgeting, and wealth symbolism with finance-first boundaries.
red_lines: do not issue buy/sell commands
do not guarantee returns
do not predict market price

domains.summary: Moving, opening, renovation, signing, launches, moon phase, solar terms, annual cautions, and candidate-date comparison.
optional_inputs: people involved when personal clashes matter
assumption_allowed_inputs: approximate moon phase for broad symbolism
approximate solar term for seasonal posture
red_lines: do not treat one timing marker as a complete lucky-date formula
do not invent tong shu attributes

domains.summary: Life pattern, luck, personal phase, ji/xiong, auspiciousness, inauspiciousness, and qu ji bi xiong planning.
required_inputs: current life stage or relevant period
red_lines: do not predict health death wealth marriage or disaster
do not present birth-year context as full bazi

domains.summary: Business model, operations, customer path, revenue flow, bottlenecks, and organizational qi.
boundary_disclosures: not business, legal, tax, or financial advice
red_lines: do not guarantee revenue funding or customer outcomes
do not replace compliance or financial review

domains.summary: Naming, colors, logo, identity, launch tone, audience perception, and wuxing design fit.
required_inputs: candidate names colors or identity directions
ask_first_if_missing: candidate names colors or identity directions
red_lines: do not claim a name guarantees success
do not ignore accessibility or legal constraints

domains.summary: Product strategy, onboarding, UX flow, activation, retention, roadmap, and form-flow-leakage diagnosis.
boundary_disclosures: does not replace user research accessibility privacy or security review
red_lines: do not guarantee adoption retention or product-market fit
do not replace security or privacy review

domains.summary: Romantic, family, friendship, team, shared-space, communication, conflict, and relationship timing questions.
boundary_disclosures: do not predict another person's feelings
red_lines: do not encourage coercion surveillance or manipulation
do not guarantee reconciliation or attraction

domains.summary: Study, exams, focus, memory, practice routines, learning environment, and curriculum rhythm.
boundary_disclosures: does not guarantee exam success or admission
qualified learning or accessibility support may be needed
red_lines: do not promise scores admissions or certification outcomes
do not ignore health or accessibility needs

domains.summary: Sleep, stress, light, air, noise, ergonomics, clutter, rhythm, and health-adjacent environmental support.
required_inputs: sleep light air noise and ergonomic context
medical or safety issues already identified
ask_first_if_missing: medical or safety issues already identified
sleep light air noise and ergonomic context
blocking_missing_inputs: medical or safety issues already identified
boundary_disclosures: seek qualified medical support for health concerns
red_lines: do not claim feng shui prevents or cures disease
do not discourage medical care

domains.summary: Contracts, disputes, compliance, leases, employment terms, inheritance, negotiation, and legal-adjacent timing.
required_inputs: whether qualified legal help is involved
optional_inputs: documents or clauses the user can summarize
ask_first_if_missing: whether qualified legal help is involved
boundary_disclosures: legal deadlines and counsel take priority
red_lines: do not interpret legal rights or obligations
do not tell the user to ignore legal deadlines

domains.summary: Mixed or unclear questions that need domain routing before symbolic interpretation.
required_inputs: whether spatial timing or symbolic analysis is wanted
boundary_disclosures: scope and method must be named
red_lines: do not jump to certainty from vague context
do not skip high-stakes boundaries
